title: Mehandipur Balaji Temple
tagline: Mehandipur Balaji Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Mehandipur Balaji Temple is a Hindu temple located in Mehandipur, Dausa district, in the Indian state of Rajasthan.
overview.description: Mehandipur Balaji Temple is a Hindu temple located in Mehandipur, Dausa district, in the Indian state of Rajasthan. The temple is dedicated to the deity Hanuman. The name Balaji refers to the childhood form of Hanuman, revered in several parts of the country. Unlike similar religious sites, it is located in a town rather than the countryside.

topPlaces.name: Todabhim
topPlaces.description: Todabhim is a city and a "municipality" in Karauli district in the Indian state of Rajasthan. It is headquarters of Todabhim sub division, tehsil and C&RD block of Karauli district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mehandipur Balaji Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mehandipur Balaji Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mehandipur Balaji Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (98 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (99 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mehandipur Balaji Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mehandipur Balaji Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mehandipur Balaji Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mehandipur Balaji Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
